card_description: Socrates is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 4 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick explores the "Daimon of Socrates" (verified by Rollo May) as the source of his 1974 "Voice" and Attic Greek."
